policy.baseline_rule: Use v0.22.1 or a later Sigstore-attested release as the provenance baseline.
policy.pre_baseline_rule: Pre-baseline releases are retained for history but are not provenance baselines unless a future additive attestation is explicitly authorized, published, and ledgered.
policy.release_artifact_rule: CO-3 did not edit, delete, replace, or upload assets for any pre-baseline release.

entries.rationale: First CivicCore release produced after the Sigstore release-provenance gate. The release workflow signed and verified release-attestation.json before publication, and the direct cosign verification command returned Verified OK.
entries.downstream_rule: Use this tag, or a later attested tag, when procurement-grade release provenance is required.

entries.rationale: Published before the v0.22.1 Sigstore gate and has no release-attestation.json or release-attestation.json.bundle asset on the live release page.
entries.downstream_rule: Retain for historical installs only; do not promote as the corrected provenance baseline.
